title: pityrogramma obtusa
intro: Pityrogramma obtusa, also known as the shield fern or obtuse shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pityrogramma obtusa include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as having antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
